generated_oml:
instance DigitalShadowMABIMAX100Axis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital shadow of the first vertical axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot, integrating sensor data, simulation, and friction estimation models."
]

instance RobotAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DigitalShadowMABIMAX100Axis
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring electrical current of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor on the first vertical axis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorPositionEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder at the motor housing, measuring motor shaft angle."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxPositionEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder at the output of the motor gearbox, measuring gearbox output shaft angle."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorPositionEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoderSensor
]

instance GearboxPositionEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxPositionEncoderSensor
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real‑time series of motor current measured in amperes."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorPositionEncoderData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped motor shaft angle measured by the motor encoder."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxPositionEncoderData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped output shaft angle measured by the gearbox encoder."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance FrictionLawModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data calculation model implementing Coulomb‑Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, and LuGre friction laws for the first axis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCalcEngineEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityCalcModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model computing angular velocity from position encoder data for the first axis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCalcEngineEnabler
]

instance DerivedTorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque estimate derived from friction law calculations."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedTorqueDataTransmitted
]

instance DerivedAngularVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
]

instance DerivedAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity estimate derived from position encoder data."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedAngularVelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance SimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable Simulink block modelling the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngineEnabler
]

instance SimulinkGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink block modelling the motor‑gearbox and cycloidal gearbox in the first axis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngineEnabler
]

instance SimulinkSystemDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Composite Simulink model coupling motor, gearbox, and friction laws for full axis dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngineEnabler
]

instance StructuralSysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Structural SysML representation of the motor and gearboxes on the first axis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker facilitating real‑time transmission of sensor data from the robot controller."
    DTDFVocab:enables MQTTDataAggregationService
]

instance SimulinkEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulink runtime environment for executing simulation models of the axis."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeSimulationService
]

instance DataCalcEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Execution engine for data calculation models (friction and velocity estimation)."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService,
        AngularVelocityIdentificationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell providing semantic integration of data and models."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataSemanticService
]

instance VisualizationDashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for hosting the web‑based visualization dashboard."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance MQTTDataAggregationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service aggregating incoming MQTT data streams for further processing."
    DTDFVocab:provides SensorDataAggregationInsight
]

instance RealTimeSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service running real‑time Simulink simulations of the motor and gearbox dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service performing continuous friction model parameter identification using collected data."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionEstimationInsight
]

instance AngularVelocityIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service estimating angular velocity from encoder data streams."
    DTDFVocab:provides AngularVelocityInsight
]

instance DataSemanticService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing semantic validation and interpretation of data and models via the AAS."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataSemanticsInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service rendering data traces and simulation results on the custom web‑based visualization dashboard."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataVisualizationInsight
]

instance SensorDataAggregationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight summarizing the aggregation status of sensor data streams."
]

instance SimulationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight comparing real‑time simulated axis behavior with actual sensor measurements."
]

instance FrictionEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing estimates of joint friction parameters (static, kinetic, viscous)."
]

instance AngularVelocityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing real‑time estimates of angular velocity of the first axis."
]

instance DataSemanticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight confirming semantic consistency between sensor data, simulation, and engineering models."
]

instance DataVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight enabling operators to visualize joint behavior, friction estimates, and simulation outputs."
]

instance AdjustControlParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action allowing operators to adjust control parameters based on friction estimates."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time data acquisition and model updates at the robot’s sensor sampling frequency (typically a few kHz), allowing continuous drift detection and incremental friction model refinement."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "An orchestrated DT comprising the asset definition, engineering models, simulation models, live data streams, processing components, and visualization services, all interconnected via AAS and MQTT to deliver a coherent digital shadow of the first robot axis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Primarily used during the operational stage; the digital shadow captures as‑manufactured structure, models as‑designed dynamics, and updates as‑operated behavior through continuous data collection and model refinement."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Traceable data provenance through original recording channels and processing steps; transitive traceability between data traces, processing components, and models; comparison of measured versus simulated quantities to validate model accuracy; continuous parameter identification mitigating drift; acknowledgment of sensor uncertainties and model approximation errors."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT is used to stream sensor data from the robot to the digital shadow; no other protocols or network architectures are mentioned."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "SysML (used for modeling), Asset Administration Shells (AAS, part of Industrie 4.0 standards), and MQTT (standard MQTT protocol). No explicit mention of other standards such as ACME, AADL, or MontiArc."
]
